mirror for the Cred402 RealFi Bridge (p6). Lets fiat         receipts (Stripe) and operator verifications (Stripe Identity) settle         on an EVM chain while their canonical commitments anchor back to the         Casper `FiatReceiptRegistry` / `OperatorVerificationRegistry`. Privacy rule (p6): NO PII on-chain. Only hashes, provider name, status, agent/operator id, currency, service type and timestamps. The canonical envelope ids are blake2b256(canonical_json(envelope)) computed off-chain (blake2b is not an EVM precompile); this mirror treats them as opaque 32-byte commitments and emits events the Casper-root relayer observes and anchors.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/Cred402RealFiMirror.sol":"Cred402RealFiMirror"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/Cred402EmergencyPause.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8ed9393a363e071dcd8ff3c1cd7b8f1b21f6df45f7aae540393b39548f452e20","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8fdd50473f8e6536afe89eafeca5a7934d77c3758d87fbcb1e25eef45e9f80a1","dweb:/ipfs/Qmc59ERNs7jmJ3c6XGyUwgpUwCivPztLQfPDoN6zbkMpUL"]},"src/Cred402RealFiMirror.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3b15766d1f0ca898a1f7171515b01ca038cfa7c7f1863da5c8a45bf7405461ea","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://33a5ef7b21210ae8bbac002e2fec8686acff39af0fe3fa1a22a68ee3f7d4609c","dweb:/ipfs/QmWjewCKeLthk3WNbZsfVMPQEicXgnwPjCoAgTmBnpuXpi"]}},"version":1}

emitters(address).notice: Authorized emitters (the relayer / operator) may publish commitments.

isOperatorVerified(string).notice: Is the operator currently verified (status == 1 and not expired)?

publishOperatorVerification(string,strin.notice: Mirror an operator verification commitment (idempotent overwrite by id).
